example_es: Respeto tu punto de vista, aunque no esté de acuerdo.

example_en: I attached the file to the email.

example_es: Nunca llego tarde a las reuniones.
example_en: I'm never late to meetings.

example_es: Vimos un reportaje sobre el cambio climático.

example_es: Buscan un modelo de desarrollo más sostenible.

example_en: The flood destroyed several houses in the town.

example_en: She loses weight when she exercises regularly.

example_en: The Pacific Ocean is the largest in the world.
